channel.title: Bim on swengin.io
channel.description: Recent content in Bim on swengin.io

item.title: Real-Time Slab Deflection Analysis: Bridging BIM and Structural Engineering
item.description:
🔧 Real-time information about slab deflections during construction? Yes, it’s possible—and I developed it! At ObraLink, I led the design and implementation of a new functionality that automatically analyzes slab deflections in real-time using BIM data and sensors. No manual modeling. No delays. Just key structural information, precisely when needed.

Video Demonstration

Real-time slab deflection analysis in action - Watch how the tool automatically processes BIM data and provides instant structural insights
